footer.tagline: Women's adventure brand in BiH — outdoor tours, wellbeing and community.
footer.newsletterDesc: Subscribe for news and tour updates.

home.title: Discover your strength in the wilds of Bosnia
home.subtitle: Women-only outdoor adventures led by women — hiking, via ferrata and expeditions through the most beautiful mountains of Bosnia and Herzegovina.
home.why1Text: A safe space where women can explore nature, push their limits and share adventures in a supportive community.
home.why2Text: All tours are led by a licensed tour guide with clearly defined safety standards.
home.why3Text: We explore the hidden natural beauty of Bosnia and Herzegovina — mountains, lakes, waterfalls and canyons.
home.why4Text: WildHer is not just a trip. It is an experience, a community and a space for personal growth.
home.tour1Desc: Via ferrata adventure above the Buna river with spectacular views.
home.tour2Desc: One-day ascent to one of the most beautiful peaks of Herzegovina.
home.tour3Desc: Multi-day mountain expedition through the wild Prenj massif.
home.testimonial1Quote: This was one of the most beautiful nature experiences I have ever had. I felt safe and inspired.
home.testimonial2Quote: WildHer showed me how much I can do. The group was wonderful and the guide incredible.
home.testimonial3Quote: It was my first time hiking in an all-women group. The feeling of safety and sisterhood is unique.
home.aboutText1: WildHer Adventures was started by a licensed tour guide and professor of physical education, driven by the idea of giving women a safe space for adventure and exploring nature.
home.aboutText2: The mountains of Bosnia and Herzegovina are an incredible place to discover your own strength, and every tour is designed to combine challenge, nature and sisterhood.
home.blog1Title: How to prepare for your first hiking adventure
home.blog1Excerpt: Tips for beginners: gear, fitness and what to expect on your first tour.
home.blog2Title: 5 most beautiful mountain lakes in Bosnia
home.blog2Excerpt: From Blidinje to Uloško — a guide to the most impressive lakes.
home.blog3Excerpt: How to feel safe and enjoy hiking in a women's group.
home.newsletterText: Get inspiration for new adventures, early access to tours and special offers.

tours.heroSubtitle: From one-day hiking trips to multi-day expeditions — find your adventure
tours.giftVoucherDesc: Option to purchase a gift voucher
tours.categoryJednodnevneIntro: One-day tours — the perfect choice for those who want a day in nature. Leave the city, hit the trail, and return the same evening.
tours.categoryVikendIntro: Weekend packages — two days of adventure. Ideal for those who want a bit more than a day trip.
tours.categoryEkspedicijeIntro: Multi-day expeditions — for true adventurers. Several days in nature, mountain peaks and unforgettable experiences.
tours.categoryRetreatIntro: Wellness and mindfulness programmes — a blend of nature, movement and relaxation in a women's community.

tourDetail.viaFerrataSubtitle: Women's adventure above the Neretva canyon
tourDetail.viaFerrataStory: The morning starts in Blagaj as the sun lights up the cliffs above the Neretva. The path climbs gently through pine forest, and the view of the canyon becomes more dramatic. After a short break we reach the via ferrata — metal rungs lead us up the rock, and each step opens a wider view of the river below.
tourDetail.forGroup: want a safe and supportive group
tourDetail.notHeights: not for people with a strong fear of heights
tourDetail.testimonialQuote: This was my first via ferrata and the feeling at the top was incredible. I felt safe and supported the whole time. Unforgettable experience!
tourDetail.storyDefault: Experience a unique adventure in a women's group.
tourDetail.notBeginners: not for complete beginners without fitness
tourDetail.testimonialQuote2: Unforgettable tour. The guide led us safely to the top.
tourDetail.testimonialQuote3: Prenj was a challenge and a fulfilment. I recommend it to anyone who loves via ferrata and mountains.
tourDetail.visocicaStory: A one-day adventure to one of the most beautiful peaks of Herzegovina.
tourDetail.prenjStory: Multi-day mountain adventure through the wild Prenj massif.

about.heroSubtitle: WildHer Adventures was born from a love of mountains, freedom, and the belief that women deserve a safe space for adventure, exploration, and connection with nature.
about.founderP1: WildHer Adventures grew out of a deep personal love for the mountains and nature of Bosnia and Herzegovina. As a licensed tour guide and professor of physical education, the founder has spent years in the mountains — exploring trails, leading groups, and discovering the hidden natural beauty this country has to offer.
about.founderP2: Through these experiences, it became clear how transformative nature can be. The mountains offer not only a physical challenge — they provide space for silence, reflection, and reconnecting with yourself.
about.founderP3: The idea for WildHer Adventures came from a desire to give women the chance to experience exactly that. Many women want to explore nature but often lack support, safety, or a community to share such an adventure with.
about.founderP4: That is why women-only outdoor tours in Bosnia and Herzegovina were created — adventures led by women and designed for women.
about.founderP5: Today WildHer Adventures organizes hiking tours, mountain trekking, via ferrata adventures, canyoning, camping, and multi-day mountain expeditions, leading participants through some of the most impressive landscapes of the Balkans.
about.founderP6: On every tour the goal is the same: to create a space where women feel safe, supported, and inspired to discover how strong they really are.
about.mission: To help women discover their strength through adventure in nature, reconnect with themselves, and experience the authentic beauty of the mountains of Bosnia and Herzegovina.
about.value1Text: Your safety is our number one priority. Every tour is planned with careful assessment of the route, weather conditions, and difficulty level.
about.value2Text: We believe every woman can do more than she thinks. The mountains often reveal strength we didn't know we had.
about.value3Text: No mass tourism or artificial experiences. Just real nature, real adventures, and genuine connection with the places we visit.
about.value4Text: WildHer Adventures brings together women who share a love of nature, adventure, and personal growth. Together we create a supportive environment where new friendships and lasting memories are made.
about.qualificationsIntro: WildHer Adventures is led by a licensed tour guide and professor of physical education, with years of experience in mountaineering, sports, and working with people.
about.qualificationsIntro2: On every tour we apply clear safety standards, including:
about.safety2: route planning and assessment of weather conditions
about.safety3: certified equipment for via ferrata and technical activities
about.safety5: small groups for individual attention and safety
about.qualificationsOutro: Our goal is for every adventure to be safe, professionally organized, and unforgettable.
about.exploreTitle: Exploring the mountains of Bosnia and Herzegovina
about.exploreP1: Bosnia and Herzegovina is one of Europe's most exciting destinations for hiking and outdoor adventure.
about.exploreP2: With more than 78 mountain peaks above 2000 meters, this country offers exceptional opportunities for exploring nature.
about.exploreListIntro: WildHer Adventures leads women through spectacular landscapes such as:
about.exploreOutro: as well as alpine lakes, hidden waterfalls, and canyons that make Bosnia and Herzegovina a unique destination for adventure tourism.
about.communityP1: WildHer Adventures is more than a tour operator.
about.communityP2: It is a community of women who share a love of hiking, adventure, and nature.
about.communityP3: On our tours new friendships are formed, inspiring stories are shared, and memories are made that last long after the adventure ends.
about.ctaText: If you want to explore the mountains of Bosnia and Herzegovina through women's hiking tours and outdoor adventures, join the WildHer community and discover how far nature can take you.
about.member1Bio: Licensed tour guide and professor of physical education. Years of experience leading groups in the mountains of BiH and sharing a love for nature.
about.member2Bio: Experienced hiker and via ferrata certified. Specializes in multi-day expeditions and canyoning.
about.member3Bio: Alpinist and first aid instructor. Ensures safety and a positive group atmosphere on every tour.
